mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pi_notice n WHERE 1=1
AND ( n.notice_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR n.notice_con LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') )

SELECT n.notice_id AS noticeId, n.user_no AS userNo, n.notice_title AS title, n.notice_con AS content, n.notice_chk AS noticeChk, n.notice_alert AS noticeAlert, n.notice_file_id AS noticeFileId, DATE_FORMAT(n.regdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS regDt, u.USER_NAME AS regUserName FROM pi_notice n LEFT JOIN pi_user u ON n.user_no = u.USER_NO WHERE n.notice_id = #{noticeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pi_notice ( user_no, notice_title, notice_con, notice_chk, notice_alert, notice_file_id, regdate ) VALUES ( #{userNo}, #{title}, #{content}, #{noticeChk}, #{noticeAlert}, #{noticeFileId}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE pi_notice SET notice_title = #{title}, notice_con = #{content}, notice_chk = #{noticeChk}, notice_alert = #{noticeAlert}, notice_file_id = #{noticeFileId} WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId}
